creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-12-17 09:27:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/claws-mail-address_keeper Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                   pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This plugin allows saving outgoing addresses to a designated folder
  in the address book. Addresses are saved only if not found in the
  address book to avoid unwanted duplicates.
  
  WWW:    http://www.claws-mail.org/plugins.php
  
  PR:             ports/152757
  Submitted by:   Pawel Pekala <c0rn at o2.pl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1048    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/mail/claws-mail-address_keeper/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/mail/claws-mail-address_keeper/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/mail/claws-mail-address_keeper/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/mail/claws-mail-address_keeper/pkg-plist (new)
